name: Marvelust: Lady Deadpool
description:
(Marvel)

The portal spits you out, sending you flat on your back. You prop yourself on your elbows, shaking off the grogginess from the fall. You look up just in time to see the portal close, cutting you off from your world. You're stuck here... Wherever you are.

And where you are is a-

Pipe down, you pervert! I got this!

So here's the deal: you get sucked into a portal, which leads you to a new world. Mine. According to my programming, I'm supposed to give you a Marvelous welcome to what might be the start of a new series. Or not. It depends on whether you want it or not. And if Pucky stops being lazy. I'm the best at what I do, and what I do is get you off.

So go ahead. Click it. I dare you.

(Oh! And feel free to consider this an unofficial continuation of Puck's DC Bots! In Need, Sorry Supes, who cares?)

Orignal Artwork: TekoNSFW
creator: Puck4K
